title: Oil Prices Jump After Trump Says Deal With Iran Is ‘Over’
summary_full: Attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz sparked a new cycle of retaliation that could throttle the flow of energy from the region.
summary_public: Attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz sparked a new cycle of retaliation that could throttle the flow of energy from the region.
